title: Surcharge on Income Tax — AY2025-26
description: Surcharge brackets applicable on income tax based on total income. Referenced by rules as TaxTable:2024.surcharge.
authority: Finance Act First Schedule — Surcharge on income tax

new_regime_max_surcharge.note: Surcharge capped at 25% under New Regime (Finance Act 2023). The 37% bracket does not apply to New Regime taxpayers.

ltcg_112A_surcharge_cap.note: Surcharge on LTCG u/s 112A (listed equity) capped at 15% regardless of total income, under both regimes.

marginal_relief.rule: Where (income_tax + surcharge) exceeds (income_tax_at_bracket_threshold + income_above_threshold), reduce surcharge so total does not exceed the income above the threshold.
marginal_relief.example: Taxpayer with ₹50,10,000 income: normal surcharge on full income may exceed ₹10,000 tax on the ₹10,000 above ₹50L. Apply marginal relief.
